forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 52. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 3 to 9 mph.

weather_report:
In the stillness of the night, Downtown San Francisco rests under a blanket of partly cloudy skies, the gentle hum of the city lulling into dreams as the temperature hovers around a mild 52 degrees. A light west-southwest wind dances softly, whispering through the streets, setting the stage for a Friday that promises a more vibrant temperament. As the sun rises, expect a transition to partly sunny skies, where the day teeters at a comfortable height of 68 degrees before gradually easing into a slightly cooler afternoon.

As the daylight unfolds, it appears that the usual marine layer has yet to assert its dominance over the city. While hints of fog flirt with the horizon, visibility seems relatively clear, allowing for splendid views of the iconic Golden Gate and the undulating hills. It’s a day that beckons for simple pleasures; perhaps a stroll along the Embarcadero or an exploration into the quaint streets of North Beach, where the aroma of freshly baked bread mingles with the crisp sea air. Dress in layers to adapt with grace to the ebb and flow of temperature—a light sweater over a shirt, paired with comfortable walking shoes, will serve you well. Embrace the call of the day, for as the clouds retreat, so too does the heaviness, allowing for a glimpse of the spirited city below, energized and alive.
